description: Create final comprehensive 4-panel evidence summary figure for NPLOC4 pseudo-DUB analysis
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig = plt.figure(figsize=(18, 14))

# Create a 3-panel figure
gs = fig.add_gridspec(3, 2, hspace=0.35, wspace=0.3, height_ratios=[1.2, 1, 1.2])

# ============================================================
# Panel A: MPN domain architecture comparison
# ============================================================
ax1 = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, :])

proteins_viz = [
    ('PSMD14/RPN11', 310, [(31, 166, 'MPN+', '#27ae60')], True, 'Active JAMM DUB', 'Zn in MPN: YES'),
    ('BRCC3/BRCC36', 316, [(12, 179, 'MPN+', '#27ae60')], True, 'Active JAMM DUB', 'Zn in MPN: YES'),
    ('PSMD7/RPN8', 324, [(9, 144, 'MPN-', '#e74c3c')], False, 'Pseudo-DUB', 'No Zn in MPN'),
    ('CSN6', 327, [(41, 174, 'MPN-', '#e74c3c')], False, 'Pseudo-DUB', 'No Zn in MPN'),
    ('NPLOC4/NPL4', 608, [(105, 225, 'ZF', '#3498db'), (226, 363, 'MPN-', '#e74c3c'), (580, 608, 'ZF', '#3498db')], False, 'Pseudo-DUB', 'Zn in ZF only'),
]

for i, (name, length, domains, is_active, label, zn_note) in enumerate(proteins_viz):
    y = len(proteins_viz) - 1 - i
    ax1.barh(y, length, height=0.5, color='#f0f0f0', edgecolor='#bdc3c7', linewidth=0.5)
    
    for start, end, dtype, color in domains:
        ax1.barh(y, end - start, left=start, height=0.5, color=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=1)
        ax1.text((start + end) / 2, y, dtype, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7, fontweight='bold', color='white')
    
    if is_active:
        for start, end, dtype, color in domains:
            if 'MPN' in dtype:
                jamm_pos = start + (end - start) * 0.6
                ax1.plot(jamm_pos, y + 0.3, 'v', color='gold', markersize=10, markeredgecolor='black', zorder=5)
    
    ax1.text(-10, y, name, ha='right', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')
    ax1.text(length + 5, y, f'{zn_note}', ha='left', va='center', fontsize=8, style='italic',
             color='#27ae60' if 'YES' in zn_note else '#e74c3c')

ax1.set_xlim(-130, 700)
ax1.set_ylim(-0.5, len(proteins_viz) - 0.5)
ax1.set_xlabel('Residue position', fontsize=10)
ax1.set_yticks([])
ax1.set_title('A. MPN Domain Architecture: Active DUBs vs Pseudo-DUBs', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')

legend_elements = [
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#27ae60', edgecolor='black', label='MPN+ (JAMM active)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#e74c3c', edgecolor='black', label='MPN- (pseudo-DUB)'),
    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='#3498db', edgecolor='black', label='Zinc finger'),
    plt.Line2D([0], [0], marker='v', color='w', markerfacecolor='gold', markeredgecolor='black', markersize=8, label='JAMM motif'),
]
ax1.legend(handles=legend_elements, loc='lower right', fontsize=8)

# ============================================================
# Panel B: JAMM motif residue alignment
# ============================================================
ax2 = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, :])
ax2.axis('off')

table_data = [
    ['Protein', 'Status', 'GW+1', 'GW+2\n(H₁?)', 'GW+3\n(S?)', 'GW+4\n(H₂?)', 'GW+15\n(D?)', 'JAMM\nIntact?', 'Zn in MPN\n(PDB)'],
    ['PSMD14', 'MPN+', 'Y', 'H ✓', 'S ✓', 'H ✓', 'D ✓', 'YES ✓', 'YES'],
    ['BRCC3', 'MPN+', 'Y', 'H ✓', 'S ✓', 'H ✓', 'D ✓', 'YES ✓', 'YES'],
    ['PSMD7', 'MPN-', 'Y', 'H', 'T', 'G', 'N', 'NO ✗', 'NO'],
    ['CSN6', 'MPN-', 'Y', 'T', 'T', 'G', 'D', 'NO ✗', 'NO'],
    ['EIF3F', 'MPN-', 'Y', 'A', 'T', 'G', 'S', 'NO ✗', 'N/A'],
    ['NPLOC4', 'MPN-', 'I *', 'F ✗', 'T ✗', 'D ✗', 'V ✗', 'NO ✗', 'NO (7WWP)'],
    ['Npl4-yeast', 'MPN-', 'R', 'Y', 'T', 'G', 'Y', 'NO ✗', 'NO (6JWH)'],
]

table = ax2.table(cellText=table_data[1:], colLabels=table_data[0],
                  cellLoc='center', loc='center',
                  colWidths=[0.12, 0.08, 0.08, 0.09, 0.08, 0.09, 0.09, 0.10, 0.12])

table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(8)
table.scale(1, 1.6)

for j in range(9):
    table[0, j].set_facecolor('#2c3e50')
    table[0, j].set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold')

for i in range(1, 8):
    for j in range(9):
        cell = table[i, j]
        text = cell.get_text().get_text()
        if i <= 2:  # Active DUBs
            if j >= 3 and j <= 6 and '✓' in text:
                cell.set_facecolor('#d5f5e3')
            elif j == 7 and 'YES' in text:
                cell.set_facecolor('#27ae60')
                cell.set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold')
            elif j == 8 and 'YES' in text:
                cell.set_facecolor('#d5f5e3')
        elif i == 6:  # NPLOC4 row
            cell.set_text_props(fontweight='bold')
            if '✗' in text:
                cell.set_facecolor('#fadbd8')
            elif j == 7:
                cell.set_facecolor('#e74c3c')
                cell.set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold')
        else:  # Other pseudo-DUBs
            if j == 7 and 'NO' in text:
                cell.set_facecolor('#fadbd8')

ax2.set_title('B. JAMM Catalytic Residue Comparison (GW-anchored alignment)', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', pad=15)

# ============================================================
# Panel C: Evidence convergence summary
# ============================================================
ax3 = fig.add_subplot(gs[2, 0])
ax3.axis('off')

evidence_lines = [
    ('Sequence Analysis', 'No H[ST]H, no HxH, GWI not GWY\nF-T-D at JAMM positions', '#e74c3c', '✗ ABSENT'),
    ('Crystal Structures\n(3 species)', 'Zero zinc in MPN domain\n(PDB: 7WWP, 6JWH, 6CDD)', '#e74c3c', '✗ NO Zn'),
    ('Groove Function\n(Sato 2019)', 'JAMM groove occupied by Ufd1\n(PMID:31836717)', '#e74c3c', '✗ REPURPOSED'),
    ('Database Consensus', 'No DUB/protease terms in\nUniProt, MEROPS, QuickGO', '#e74c3c', '✗ NOT CLASSIFIED'),
    ('Functional Literature', 'Complex uses separate DUBs\n(Bodnar 2017, Twomey 2019)', '#e74c3c', '✗ NOT DUB'),
]

for i, (source, finding, color, verdict) in enumerate(evidence_lines):
    y = 0.88 - i * 0.18
    
    # Arrow pointing to verdict
    rect = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((0.0, y - 0.06), 0.35, 0.12,
                                    boxstyle="round,pad=0.02", facecolor='#f8f9fa',
                                    edgecolor='#bdc3c7', transform=ax3.transAxes)
    ax3.add_patch(rect)
    ax3.text(0.175, y + 0.02, source, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8,
             fontweight='bold', transform=ax3.transAxes)
    ax3.text(0.175, y - 0.03, finding, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=6.5,
             color='#555', transform=ax3.transAxes)
    
    # Verdict box
    rect2 = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((0.55, y - 0.04), 0.4, 0.08,
                                     boxstyle="round,pad=0.02", facecolor=color,
                                     edgecolor='darkred', alpha=0.9, transform=ax3.transAxes)
    ax3.add_patch(rect2)
    ax3.text(0.75, y, verdict, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9,
             fontweight='bold', color='white', transform=ax3.transAxes)
    
    # Connecting arrow
    ax3.annotate('', xy=(0.55, y), xytext=(0.38, y),
                 arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='#555', lw=1.5),
                 transform=ax3.transAxes)

ax3.set_title('C. Evidence Convergence', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')

# ============================================================
# Panel D: GO decision summary
# ============================================================
ax4 = fig.add_subplot(gs[2, 1])
ax4.axis('off')

# GO decision box
decision_box = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((0.05, 0.55), 0.9, 0.35,
                                        boxstyle="round,pad=0.03",
                                        facecolor='#fadbd8', edgecolor='#c0392b',
                                        linewidth=2, transform=ax4.transAxes)
ax4.add_patch(decision_box)

ax4.text(0.5, 0.82, 'GO:0004843', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=14,
         fontweight='bold', color='#c0392b', transform=ax4.transAxes)
ax4.text(0.5, 0.74, 'cysteine-type deubiquitinase activity', ha='center', va='center',
         fontsize=10, style='italic', color='#c0392b', transform=ax4.transAxes)
ax4.text(0.5, 0.63, 'DO NOT ANNOTATE', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=16,
         fontweight='bold', color='#c0392b', transform=ax4.transAxes)

# Reasons box
reasons = [
    '1. NPLOC4 is MPN- (pseudo-DUB) — no catalytic activity',
    '2. Wrong mechanism: JAMM=metalloprotease ≠ cysteine-type',
    '3. No DUB domain of ANY class in NPLOC4',
    '4. Not currently annotated (correctly absent)',
    '5. Core function: ubiquitin-binding cofactor of p97',
]

for i, reason in enumerate(reasons):
    y = 0.45 - i * 0.09
    ax4.text(0.08, y, reason, ha='left', va='center', fontsize=8,
             transform=ax4.transAxes, color='#2c3e50')

# Verdict stamp
stamp = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((0.15, 0.01), 0.7, 0.08,
                                 boxstyle="round,pad=0.02",
                                 facecolor='#27ae60', edgecolor='#1a7a3a',
                                 linewidth=2, transform=ax4.transAxes)
ax4.add_patch(stamp)
ax4.text(0.5, 0.05, 'VERDICT: SUPPORTED — NPLOC4 is a pseudo-DUB',
         ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold',
         color='white', transform=ax4.transAxes)

ax4.set_title('D. GO Curation Decision', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')

plt.suptitle('NPLOC4 MPN Domain Analysis: Pseudo-DUB Classification and GO:0004843 Assessment',
             fontsize=15, fontweight='bold', y=0.98)

plt.savefig('nploc4_comprehensive_summary.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Comprehensive summary figure saved")
